summary: Frontend-only MVP for Memento (AI travel planner) tested end-to-end on desktop viewport (1920x1080). All 17 functional requirements from the review request pass cleanly: landing, navigation rail (6 items), chat with mocked AI replies, intake wizard (6 steps + back/forward), confirm card → generating indicator (~2.4s) → Paris itinerary render, standalone itinerary route with sticky top bar, trips/explore/saved/settings pages, login & signup split-layout pages with SSO buttons. Smart hack click triggers a toast. Trip card click navigates to /itinerary/:id. No console or page errors detected on any screen.
critical_code_review_comments: Chat.jsx line 29: condition `messages.length <= 1` causes the first AI reply to always be the Paris-spring response regardless of what the user typed (since SAMPLE_CHAT begins with 1 AI welcome message). Acceptable for mock but worth noting.

ChatThread.jsx confirm card is rendered inside the scrolling messages list; after generating, the card disappears correctly but the 'Edit something' button (data-testid=confirm-edit-btn) has no onClick handler — it is a dead button. Low priority (UI mock).
AppShell hides NavRail only on /auth pages. The chat page hides itinerary side-panel below md breakpoint but still keeps nav rail on desktop — works as intended.
Landing.jsx hero CTAs and footer links use anchor `#` (Privacy/Terms/Contact) which is fine for the MVP but lighthouse will flag.

All major interactive elements have data-testid (verified: hero-cta-plan, nav-*, chat-input, chat-send-btn, switch-to-wizard, wizard-next/back, confirm-generate-btn, generating-indicator, smart-hacks-strip, day cards, activity cards, trip-card-*). Good coverage.
seed_data_creation: None — uses static mock data from /app/frontend/src/lib/mockData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend untouched per spec; do NOT add backend tests. All data is mocked client-side. Test against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://journey-screens.preview.emergentagent.com. Verified flows: Landing→/chat CTA, NavRail (6 items: home/chat/trips/explore/saved/settings), Chat send (user+AI mock reply), Wizard 6-step + back/next, Confirm card→2.4s generate→Paris itinerary on right panel, Standalone /itinerary/trip-paris-001, Trips (4 cards + new trip), Explore (8 destinations incl. New York/NY), Saved (4 image cards), Settings (profile/preferences toggles/privacy), Auth login & signup split layouts with Google/Apple SSO.
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA — all critical paths working.
